title: The Tea Party Opens
description: On pages 15–18, this part focuses on Big Mom Pirates, Jinbe, Big Mom, Luffy as The wedding ceremony and tea party begin, with Big Mom’s enemies preparing to strike.
scene: The wedding begins under Big Mom’s watch, with hidden assassination plans moving beneath the ceremony.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Dogtooth's a logia-type! He has the Mochi-mochi no mi!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: It's Boss Jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #13
dialogue.text: Jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you've got some water around, you can get out of it, but better not to touch it at all!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm the one that told Luffy about Mother Caramel!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You hear rumors and whatnot, being under you for so long!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You're not going to give up on quitting, I see! But...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: How dare you take the side of the criminal that destroyed my cake?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: I assume this is outright mutiny, no?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Please, do think of it that way!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm quitting your organization! I want to join the straw hat pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: WhA-?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What big news! Former Shichibuki jinbe is...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: Joining the straw hats!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Do what- ever you wish after leaving! I couldn't care less!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: But to leave, I'll need you to make payment! I doubt you'd want to live with the shame of not doing it, either!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Yes... If you promise to not lay a hand on any of the others,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll lay down as much lifespan as you care to take!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #14
dialogue.text: What are you saying, jinbe?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: You can't join my crew if you're dead!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Lifespan is my favorite food! I see... looks like you really don't like me!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Choosing to rather die than be some- where you don't want to be... can't sympathize with that! Nope!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Fine, then! Make your move, fool!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Stay

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: IMPOS- SIBLE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Life?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Life!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: No way! jinbe's actually ...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Stay

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: Life?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #15
dialogue.text: His soul isn't coming out!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: He isn't scared in the slightest of Mama!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: There's no way a man that intends to join the crew of the future pirate King

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: This marks my departure from the big mom pirates!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Will cover at a mere yonkou!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Thank you for everything!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: If you won't take my lifespan,

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Then allow me to at least offer up a cup of sake!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Mama can't take away his lifespan!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: This means we're enemies now, right?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: WAAA! Here she comes! Whoa!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: You're so cool, jinbe!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Middle middle of the Opera- Tion?!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Yay!

dialogue.speaker: Big Mom Pirates
dialogue.text: Haaaaahahahahahaha! Mamaama!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: Congrat-ULATIONS, JINBE!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: YOHO HO!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #16
dialogue.text: ONE PIECE -

dialogue.speaker: Jinbe
dialogue.text: Who is this Luffy?!

summary: This section advances the Whole Cake Island — Tea Party Begins storyline with 49 dialogue beats. The wedding and tea party begin, placing Sanji, Pudding, Big Mom, Bege and the Straw Hats on a collision course.
